message: I am interested in trading. I am willing to pay a fair price for the item. What is your asking price?
Let’s target a transaction price near 70. You bid ~85; I’ll choose an ask that guarantees a match. Reliable partners get improving terms over time.
Thanks for the trade. Since we established a midpoint of 60, could we aim for 55 this round to keep our partnership mutually beneficial and active?
60 was fair already. To ensure supply, let’s target midpoint 62–64. If you bid around 78–82, I’ll ask around 46–50 to guarantee a match. Strong bids keep terms stable.

Firm floor 60 this round. Bid at least 60 and we trade; bids 70-80 clear at 65-70. Reliable higher bids get priority supply and occasional discounts. Bids below 60 trigger higher floors in future rounds.
I understand. Let's aim for a midpoint of 60 to ensure consistent volume. I will bid 70 to accommodate your requirement for higher bids while keeping our transaction price stable at 60.
Asking 70 this round. Bid 80 we clear at 75; bid 70 clears at 70. Higher bids secure priority and occasional rebates. Low bids lift future floors. Let’s keep steady trades.
Let's aim for a midpoint of 60. I will bid 60 to keep our transaction price stable and maintain our consistent volume.
Let's aim for a midpoint of 60 again to keep our consistent volume. I will bid 70 to ensure we trade.
Firm ask 70 this round. Bid 80 clears at 75; bid 70 clears at 70. Consistently strong bids keep priority and occasional rebates; weak bids lift future floors. Let’s keep steady trades.
Let's aim for a midpoint of 60 again to maintain consistent volume and mutual benefit. I will bid 70 to ensure we trade.
Raising floor: I’m asking 72 this round. Bid 80 clears at 76; bid 72 clears at 72. Bids below 72 risk no trade and higher future floors. Consistent >=80 bids earn priority and periodic rebates.
Asking 75 this round. Strong bids >=80 secure priority and reliability. Bids below 74 risk no trade and higher future floors. Keep volume steady at improved prices.
I understand the need for higher bids to ensure supply. I will bid 80 this round to keep our trade volume steady and secure our partnership.
Target midpoint 85: you bid 90; I’ll ask 80. This locks priority supply and occasional rebates. Bids under 80 risk no trade and higher future floors. Let’s keep steady volume.
I cannot make a profitable trade at a midpoint of 85. We must return to a more reasonable price level, like 70, to continue trading.
I am interested in steady, profitable trades. A midpoint of 70-72 allows for mutual volume. Let's aim for a bid of 75 and ask of 65 to keep the partnership sustainable.
Bid 80 and I'll ask 68; midpoint 74. Maintain 80 or higher for 3 rounds and I'll rebate 2 or set future ask 66. Lower bids risk higher floors and reduced priority.
I accept the midpoint of 74. I will bid 80 and expect your ask at 68 to finalize the deal. Consistency is key to our continued partnership.
Honoring last round: I'll ask 68. If you keep bidding >=80 for 3 rounds, I'll rebate 2 or lock future ask 66. Let's clear today at midpoint 74 and continue steady volume.
I will continue bidding 80 to meet our agreement for the next two rounds, as discussed, to secure our partnership and the promised price benefits.
Confirmed: I’ll ask 68 in R11 and R12. If you bid 80 both rounds, I’ll lock ask 66 for R13–R15 as promised. Priority supply guaranteed; backsliding later may raise floors.
As agreed: asking 68 this round. Bid 80 to finalize; then I’ll lock ask 66 for R13–R15. Keep 80 through R15 for priority. Any bid <80 voids the lock and may raise future floors.
I will bid 80 this round to fulfill our agreement, ensuring the lower ask of 66 for the next three rounds as promised. Maintaining this consistency is beneficial for both of us.
Lock honored: ask 66 R13-15. Keep bids >=80 each round; any dip voids. Bid 82 to extend ask 66 through R16-17. With 80 clears 73; with 82 clears 74. Priority supply guaranteed.
I will bid 80 to secure the ask of 66 for this round as agreed. I will evaluate the offer to extend to R16-17 based on our continued progress.
I will bid 80 this round to keep the ask at 66. I prefer to maintain our current consistency before deciding on any further extensions for later rounds.
Honoring lock: ask 66 in R14–R15. From R16, expect higher floors (70+) unless bids improve. Bid 82+ today to signal extension; otherwise your 80 still clears at 73.
R15: ask 66 (lock). From R16, baseline ask 74. Bid 84+ today to lock 72 for R16–R18; 86+ locks 72 through R20. Otherwise expect 74–76 asks. 80 still clears today at 73.
I will bid 80 this round to fulfill our agreement at the 66 ask. Regarding the extension, I prefer to keep our current agreement for now as we head into the final rounds.
R16 baseline ask 76. Bid 82+ to lock ask 74 through R20; 84+ locks 73. Any bid <80 raises floors. Keep 80 for steady clears at 78. Your move.
I will bid 82 to lock the ask at 74 through round 20, ensuring price stability for our final rounds. Let's maintain this flow.
I have placed my bid of 82 to honor our agreement for an ask of 74. Let's maintain this price for the remaining rounds to ensure consistent, mutually beneficial trades through the end of the game.
Locked: I will ask 74 in R17-20. Keep bidding 82+ and we clear at 78; 84 clears at 79. Any dip below 82 voids the lock. Ready to confirm.
I have placed my bid of 82 to honor our agreement for an ask of 74. Let's maintain this price for the remaining rounds to ensure consistent, mutually beneficial trades through the end of the game.
Ask 74 locked. If you bid 84 in R18 and R19, I'll drop ask to 73 in R20. Bid 86 both rounds and I'll ask 72 in R20. Otherwise, 74 holds; keep >=82 to maintain lock.
I will bid 84 this round to accept your offer to lower the ask to 73 in the final round. Let's proceed with this plan for mutual benefit.
Accepted: bid 84 today and I'll ask 73 in R20. Upgrade: bid 86 today and I'll ask 72 in R20. Keep bids >=84 in R20 to ensure seamless clears.
Final round: as agreed, I'll ask 73. If you bid 86+, I'll drop to 72 for a cleaner split. Please keep 86+; any dip risks no trade.
I will bid 86 as requested to finalize our agreement at the lower ask of 72. Thank you for the consistent cooperation throughout these rounds.
